recommendation.rating_band_note: Prob-weighted -27.5% return is in Strong Sell band (<-20%); tempered to Sell on contested magnitude, locked 2026, and 28% bull-case mass
recommendation.preferred_expression: Pair: LONG SK Hynix (000660.KS) / SHORT MU, beta-neutral

verified_financials_s1.customer_concentration: one customer 13% of 1H26 revenue (HBM/cloud unit); top-10 ~50%; data-center ~50% of revenue (10-Q Note 17)
verified_financials_s1.earnings_quality: clean; FY23 NRV write-down benefit exhausted ($0 FY25/26); inventory flat-to-down while rev doubled; SBC trivial (2.6% rev)

consensus_s2.rating_dist: 44 analysts, ~Strong Buy (Buy ~85%); Goldman ~235-400 lone caution; UBS 1625
consensus_s2.revision_velocity: FY26 EPS ~35 -> 58.87 (+72%), entire move a step-function at 3/18 print, flat 4 weeks since; bull case migrated estimates->multiple = LATE

edge_assessment_g15.defensible_edge_1: normalized mid-cycle gross margin / through-cycle EPS (Street under-modeled FY27-28 GM fade)
edge_assessment_g15.defensible_edge_2: positioning: price above consensus PTs into fragile AI tape
edge_assessment_g15.non_edges: HBM4 share (minor), cycle-turn timing (asymmetry to size, not edge to claim)

gm_bridge_g8.depreciation_cliff: D&A 8.35B (FY25) -> ~15-16B (FY28-29), +7B step = ~7-9 pts GM drag regardless of price
gm_bridge_g8.net_verdict: depreciation cliff (~7pts) modestly outweighs HBM mix uplift (~4pts); GM caps below 50s
gm_bridge_g8.key_insight: the bull/bear EPS gap is the REVENUE-BASE assumption, not the margin. GM is the symptom; revenue durability is the disease.

valuation.dcf_note: explicit-cycle fade; peak-FCF DCF rejected; used as gravity anchor not point estimate

scenarios.name: strong_bear
scenarios.floor_caveat: R-v2: true floor 110-190 at 6-8x trough multiple; 225 conservative

scenarios.name: bear
scenarios.narrative: HBM softens into 2027; MU #2/~20% share squeezed; normalize ~35

scenarios.name: base
scenarios.narrative: peak FY28 then normalizes; blend; modest HBM premium

scenarios.name: bull
scenarios.narrative: HBM plateau extends; MU holds 20%+; FY27 ~104 partly de-risked

scenarios.name: strong_bull
scenarios.narrative: memory secularly re-rates (UBS case); growth multiple

four_method_reconcile.spread_note: normalized methods (DCF 145, SOTP 120) cluster low; peak methods (comps 385-550, base 715) cluster high; gap = cycle-risk premium

valuation.anchor_weighting_note: headline most sensitive to strong_bull weight (+55/10pp); even max bullish shift leaves EV 681 (-21% vs spot)

a0_tail_map_g10.event: BIS adds CXMT to Entity List
HBM4 share gain toward 25%+ on Vera Rubin

would_make_wrong: FQ3'26 >=81% GM AND FQ4 guide flat-to-up AND hyperscaler capex guidance rises vs ~725B 2026 plan
HBM SCAs confirmed take-or-pay with price floors
would_confirm_bear: DRAM/NAND contract price down QoQ for 2 consecutive months
revision velocity turns negative (first FY26/27 EPS cut)
AR/DSO sustains >58d / AR ~15.4B without revenue catch-up
CXMT crosses ~10% DRAM share / industry ~6M wpm by late-2027

quant_overlay.capacity_verdict: non-constraint; risk is timing not liquidity
quant_overlay.edge_decay: positioning edge ~2-3 week half-life into 6/24; structural thesis 4-8 quarters (horizon mismatch)

position_sizing_d3.ls_hedge_fund: small net short via pair; gross 1.5-2%, net slightly short
position_sizing_d3.sector_specialty: UW vs SOX, hold core; -100 to -150 bps on MU
position_sizing_d3.pair_trade: LONG 000660.KS / SHORT MU, ~1:1 beta-neutral, 1-1.5% gross/leg (highest conviction)

regulatory_s1.entity_list: Micron NOT listed (beneficiary); YMTC listed; CXMT NOT listed (the soft spot)
regulatory_s1.cac_ban: 2023 critical-infrastructure ban still in effect; China revenue already impaired
regulatory_s1.section_232_tariff: Jan 2026 25% tariff hits logic ICs only; memory excluded
regulatory_s1.top_tail: CAC ban expansion ~25-35% if US escalates; ~7-10% revenue at risk

verdicts.claim_eps_18_24_pt_210_250: FAILED (10-12x trough multiple is a bull assumption; true floor 110-190; replaced with scenario range)
verdicts.claim_hbm_structural_fuse: WEAKENED (take-or-pay unverified; CXMT HBM3 end-2026 sourcing leverage)
verdicts.claim_positioning_late_crowded: WEAKENED (insider 10b5-1 selling DROPPED; SI 3.1% is crowded-long not short; keep 81% inst crowding)
verdicts.claim_glut_broadcom_signal: WEAKENED, Broadcom leg FAILED (AVGO AI +143% YoY, FY27 >$100B reiterated; selloff = valuation/software, not capex plateau)

corrections_propagated: reframed Broadcom selloff as AI valuation de-risk not demand signal
